nasb.text: When the disciples heard this, they were very astonished and said, “Then who can be saved?”

esv.text: When the disciples heard this, they were greatly astonished, saying, “Who then can be saved?”

cnv.text: 門徒聽見了，十分驚奇，就問他：“這樣，誰可以得救呢？”

ccb.text: 门徒听了，惊奇地问：“这样，谁能得救呢？”

csbs.text: 门徒们听了这话，极其惊讶，就说：“究竟谁能得救呢？”
